name: Golf365 Boise
about: Golf365 Boise is a specialized golf training and club fitting studio that combines personalized coaching with advanced simulator technology. They offer services including private lessons, performance coaching, and professional club fitting for golfers of all skill levels. The facility is equipped with a simulator bay and employs experienced teaching professionals who focus on swing analysis, impact training, and equipment optimization to help players improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized training programs tailored to individual physical attributes and learning styles
Advanced club fitting services with premium custom club partners like Henry-Griffitts and Edel
Simulator technology provides data-driven swing analysis and performance tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for lessons and simulator sessions. However, club fitting services are available to help you find the perfect clubs if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify policies on outside food and drinks, so it is best to check with them directly before bringing any items.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18-hole sessions, but it is recommended to inquire about session durations when booking.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf365 Boise is kid-friendly and offers club fitting services for young players, with a flexible system that can adapt as they grow.
